data.body: Bug details: In a host project using the DSO plugin, only 3 skills are visible/accessible: /dso:tdd-workflow, /dso:debug-everything, /dso:playwright-debug. All other skills (/dso:sprint, /dso:fix-bug, /dso:brainstorm, /dso:preplanning, /dso:implementation-plan, /dso:commit, /dso:review, /dso:end, etc.) are not available. Additionally: when /dso:sprint is invoked via the Skill tool, it returns 'Launching skill: dso:sprint' without displaying the skill body — the skill was never expanded, so execution proceeded based on codebase patterns rather than explicit sprint instructions. This is a plugin installation/sync issue — the full skill set is not being made available to the Skill tool in host project sessions. Expected: all DSO skills defined in plugins/dso/skills/ should be available in host projects. Actual: only 3 skills accessible. Root cause likely: incomplete plugin cache sync or skill manifest not including all skill files.
